channel.title: Widget Watch — Delta Air Lines Flight Tracker
channel.description: Real-time Delta Air Lines operations dashboard. Live flight tracking, hub delay monitoring, WiFi fleet status, and operational analytics for all 9 Delta hubs.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Live Flight Dashboard
item.description: Track every Delta Air Lines flight in real time. 600+ flights on a live map updated every 30 seconds. Hub delay alerts, IRROPS monitoring, flight search, and weather radar.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Fleet Database — 1,078 Aircraft
item.description: Complete Delta Air Lines fleet database. Search 1,078 mainline aircraft by type, registration, seat configuration, WiFi, and status. Boeing 737, 757, 767, 777, 787, Airbus A319, A320, A321neo.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Hub Airports — All 9 Hubs
item.description: Live status at all 9 Delta Air Lines hub airports. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance at ATL, JFK, LGA, BOS, DTW, MSP, SLC, LAX, SEA.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Atlanta (ATL) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Atlanta. Real-time delays, cancellations, on-time performance, WiFi, and schedules. Delta's largest hub with ~750 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at LaGuardia (LGA) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at LaGuardia. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance, WiFi. Delta's second-largest hub with ~540 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at New York (JFK) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at New York. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's International gateway with ~400 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Boston (BOS) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Boston Logan. Real-time delays, cancellations, on-time performance, WiFi, and schedules. Delta's New England hub with ~200 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Detroit (DTW) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Detroit Metropolitan. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance, WiFi. Delta's Midwest hub with ~350 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Minneapolis (MSP) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Minneapolis-Saint Paul International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Upper Midwest hub with ~400 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Los Angeles (LAX) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Los Angeles International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Pacific gateway with ~200 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Seattle (SEA) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Seattle-Tacoma International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Pacific Northwest hub with ~250 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Salt Lake City (SLC) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Salt Lake City International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Mountain West hub with ~300 daily departures.
